emails.subject: Tennessee?
emails.body: Tennessee? I know how you feel. No way Nebraska should be playing for the championship. Should be Oregon.

emails.subject: Tennessee?
emails.body: Tennessee? I know how you feel. No way Nebraska should be playing for the championship. Should be Oregon.

emails.subject: RE: Tennessee?
emails.body: RE: Tennessee? But Oregon would be eaten alive by Miami they haven't played anyone this year. Just got a call about a power originator job in Denver. Interesting! To: Ward, Kim S (Houston)
